title: Tick Control in Union, NJ | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Union, New Jersey. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease with expert tick treatment. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Union, New Jersey residents face increasing tick populations in residential yards, parks, and wooded areas throughout the township. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect Union families and pets from tick-borne diseases like Lyme disease and Rocky Mountain spotted fever. Our targeted treatments eliminate ticks at all life stages while keeping your outdoor spaces safe for recreation.
whyUs: We serve Union with over 15 years of experience in tick management, using EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets. Our technicians understand Union's unique landscape, from the neighborhoods near Kawameeh Park to properties along the Rahway River, and customize treatments to provide maximum protection with minimal environmental impact.
localContext: Union's tree-lined neighborhoods, proximity to the Watchung Reservation, and abundant parks like Friberger Park create ideal habitats for deer ticks and other species. Properties near Battle Hill, Connecticut Farms, and throughout the township's residential areas benefit from regular tick barrier treatments during peak season from April through October.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Union range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and the extent of treatment needed. We provide free estimates and can customize a treatment plan based on your yard's specific risk factors and proximity to wooded areas.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Union, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Union typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active whenever temperatures rise above freezing, so year-round vigilance is important in our area.

faqs.question: Are your tick treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied according to label directions. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and allowing treated areas to dry completely (typically 2-3 hours) before resuming normal outdoor activities.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments in Union?
faqs.answer: We recommend monthly treatments during peak tick season (May through September) for optimal protection. Properties adjacent to wooded areas like the Watchung Reservation or with heavy deer traffic may benefit from treatments starting in early April and continuing through October.
